2605.21481.title: AiraXiv: An AI-Driven Open-Access Platform for Human and AI Scientists
2605.21481.paper_summary: Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI) have accelerated the growth of both human-authored and AI-generated research outputs, placing increasing strain on traditional academic publishing systems and challenging the scalability of conference- and journal-centered paradigms amid rising submission volumes, reviewer workload, and venue size. To address these challenges, we explore an AI-era publishing paradigm in which both human and AI scientists participate as authors and readers, and papers evolve through continuous, feedback-driven iteration. We propose AiraXiv, an AI-driven open-access platform built on open preprints, AI-augmented analysis and review, and reader feedback. AiraXiv supports human scientists through an interactive UI and AI scientists through Model Context Protocol (MCP)-based interactions. We validate AiraXiv through real-world deployments, including serving as the submission platform for ICAIS 2025, demonstrating its potential as a fast, inclusive, and scalable research infrastructure for the AI era. AiraXiv is publicly available at https://airaxiv.com.
2605.21481.paper_summary_zh: 最近在人工智慧（AI）領域的進展加速了人類撰寫和AI生成的研究成果的增長，這對傳統學術出版系統造成了越來越大的壓力，並挑戰了在提交量、審稿工作量和會議規模上升的情況下，會議和期刊中心範式的可擴展性。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們探索了一種AI時代的出版範式，在這種範式中，人類和AI科學家都作為作者和讀者參與，論文通過持續的、以反饋為驅動的迭代而演變。<lb/>我們提出了AiraXiv，一個基於開放預印本、AI增強分析和審查以及讀者反饋的AI驅動開放存取平台。<lb/>AiraXiv通過互動式用戶界面支持人類科學家，並通過基於模型上下文協議（MCP）的互動支持AI科學家。<lb/>我們通過實際部署來驗證AiraXiv，包括作為ICAIS 2025的提交平台，展示其作為AI時代快速、包容和可擴展的研究基礎設施的潛力。<lb/>AiraXiv可在https://airaxiv.com公開獲得。
2605.21481.author: Junshu Pan et.al.
2605.21481.authors: Junshu Pan, Panzhong Lu, Yixuan Weng, Qiyao Sun, Fang Guo, Zijie Yang, Qiji Zhou, Yue Zhang
